overall.description: A smooth first-person walkthrough of a luxurious futuristic rooftop terrace from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring modern gold-and-glass architecture, designer lounge furniture, and an infinity pool with panoramic mountain and coastal views. The scene is bathed in warm morning sunlight with no visible characters or movement other than the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered rooftop terrace with designer lounge seating

agents.ego_description: walking slowly forward under large white umbrellas along the marble terrace

entered.detail: oversized white canvas patio umbrella providing shade over the terrace
silver metallic bean bag style lounge chairs scattered on the terrace
futuristic building with gold metallic facade and dark tinted glass windows
transparent glass safety railing along the edge of the rooftop
tall palm trees visible beyond the terrace edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a luxurious rooftop terrace shaded by large white umbrellas. The camera moves forward past silver bean bag chairs on polished marble flooring, with a modern gold building visible to the left and glass railings revealing palm trees and distant views to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open terrace with central daybed and ocean vista

events.description: moving out from under umbrella shade into direct bright sunlight
passing underneath overhead structural beam creating brief shadow

agents.ego_description: approaching the central daybed while moving from shaded to sunlit areas

entered.detail: low black platform with white mattress and leopard print throw blanket
ornate stone lantern sculpture placed beside the daybed
tall industrial metal tower structure with platforms rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the shaded umbrella area into bright sunlight, approaching a central daybed platform with decorative stone lantern. A tall metal tower becomes visible in the background as the camera passes underneath an overhead structural beam, with the gold building now closer on the left.

events.description: turning right to follow the building facade along the terrace edge

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking along the building exterior past lounge chairs

entered.detail: teak wooden lounge chairs with blue cushions arranged along the terrace edge
futuristic automated door entrance to the building interior

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to walk along the building's gold facade, passing under a covered overhang. Wooden lounge chairs line the right side while the tall metal tower shifts from left to right in the frame. The daybed is left behind as the camera approaches a building entrance door.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop infinity pool deck with mountain panorama

events.description: terrace surface transitions from marble to wooden decking as infinity pool comes into view

agents.ego_description: approaching the infinity pool with panoramic mountain views

entered.detail: curved infinity edge swimming pool with clear blue water reflecting the sky
distant mountain range visible beyond the pool edge
white patio umbrella shading lounge chairs by the pool

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wooden deck surrounding a stunning infinity pool that blends into the distant mountain vista. The camera moves toward the pool edge, leaving the building facade behind on the left, with white poolside umbrellas and the expansive landscape dominating the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a luxurious rooftop terrace that transitions from a shaded lounge area into an expansive, sun-drenched poolside vista. It begins under large white umbrellas, gliding past silver bean bag chairs on polished marble flooring with a gold building to the left and palm trees visible beyond the glass railings. As the camera exits the shade into bright sunlight, it passes a central daybed and a decorative stone lantern before moving under an overhead structural beam toward a towering metal spire in the distance. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right to follow the gold facade under a covered overhang, passing wooden lounge chairs and leaving the daybed behind while approaching a building entrance. Finally, the movement opens onto a wooden deck where the building recedes to the left, leading the camera toward the edge of a stunning infinity pool that blends seamlessly into a panoramic mountain landscape.
